news-korea-econ.title: DOUG SCHOEN: Trump put 2026 election officials on notice. Now he needs a clear agenda
news-korea-econ.description: Trump's White House address put election officials on notice about foreign interference, but failed to deliver a sustained argument on affordability.

news-global-econ.title: Polis: Socialism 'a Tool to Further Exploit People'
news-global-econ.description: On Friday’s broadcast of CNN’s “Laura Coates Live,” Colorado Gov. Jared Polis (D) stated that “socialism is a tool to further exploit people. By putting the government and the power of the economy together, you’re preventing that counterbalance that governmen…

news-global-econ.title: Weight-loss drugs may improve job prospects and dating odds for one group
news-global-econ.description: A weight-loss specialist says GLP-1 results boost confidence in job interviews and dating, but the study found no clear improvement in well-being.

news-global-econ.title: Incoming UK PM Andy Burnham rejects Thatcher-era policies, signals leftward shift
news-global-econ.description: Andy Burnham condemned Margaret Thatcher's legacy and promised public ownership of utilities, housing and transport in his first Labour leader speech.

news-global-econ.title: Trump's housing chief paints a grim picture for homeownership in one major American city
news-global-econ.description: Scott Turner blasted Mayor Zohran Mamdani's rent freeze and tax proposals, saying socialist progressive policies will drive businesses from New York City.

news-global-econ.title: Embarrassing: DSA Chevalier Says Sweden and Norway Are Socialist (They're Not)
news-global-econ.description: Thursday on “The Alex Marlow Show,” Breitbart Editor-in-Chief Alex Marlow talked about socialism. Marlow said, “Neither Sweden nor Norway are socialist. They’re called social democracies, but they basically have capitalist market economies.” The Alex Marlow S…

news-global-soc.title: Martha Stewart Boasts of Her Luxury EV's Ability to Filter Canadian Wildfire Smoke While Sowing Fear About Global Warming
news-global-soc.description:
Martha Stewart is getting mocked for her comments on Canadian wildfires polluting large swathes of the United States, as she spreads fear about "global warming" causing mass deaths -- while also boasting about the capabilities of her luxury vehicle.
The post …

news-global-soc.title: Federal employees can download TikTok on government devices after ByteDance's divestiture, DOJ says
news-global-soc.description: A DOJ memo reversed the 2022 ban after ByteDance transferred TikTok's U.S. operations and user data to a majority American-owned joint venture.

news-global-soc.title: Mike Waltz, Tim Tebow launch effort to combat online child exploitation: 'It's happening in their backyard'
news-global-soc.description: Tim Tebow warns parents that online child predators are "in their backyard" as former football star and U.N. Ambassador Mike Waltz unveil a new global anti-exploitation effort.

news-global-soc.title: Rubio's call to combat global funders of far-left terrorism could put Singham in crosshairs
news-global-soc.description: Neville Roy Singham faces a grand jury probe as Marco Rubio urges 60 countries to treat far-left political terrorism as a counterterrorism priority.
